title: Signed CAPSULE — Ingress Event Envelope
description: Every external event entering the arifOS federation is wrapped in a signed CAPSULE before dispatch. HMAC-verified at ingress, Ed25519-signed by did:aaa:ingress, appended to VAULT999 Merkle tree. This schema defines the canonical shape.

capsule_version.description: Schema version — bump on breaking changes

event_id.description: SHA256(payload || timestamp) — globally unique, idempotency key

ts.description: Unix epoch seconds — capsule creation time

event_type.description: Source-specific event classifier: pull_request.opened, alert.firing, schedule.daily, etc.

payload_hash.description: SHA256 of the raw webhook payload bytes — ties capsule to source event

source_verified.description: Did the ingress HMAC/Ed25519 verification pass? false = VOID capsule

source_verification_method.description: How the source event was authenticated

source_signature.description: The raw source signature header value — retained for audit replay

source_delivery_id.description: Source-provided delivery ID for dedup: GitHub x-github-delivery, Grafana rule-id, etc.

received_at.description: ISO 8601 — when AAA ingress received the event

ingress_signer_did.description: DID of the AAA ingress key that signed this capsule

ingress_signature.description: Base64-encoded Ed25519 signature over canonical_json(capsule without sig field)

nonce.description: Random 16-byte hex — replay prevention within 300s window

trigger.description: Resolved trigger routing — filled by AAA after lookup

target_agent.description: Agent pool to execute the skill

hold.description: true if trigger-map matched a hold_for condition

hold_reason.description: Why the trigger was held — F13 attestation required

capability_token.description: JWT-style DID capability token signed by did:arif:omega — F13-authorized scope for this execution

merkle.description: VAULT999 Merkle tree position — filled after append

leaf_index.description: Zero-based leaf position in the tree

leaf_hash.description: SHA256 of this capsule — the leaf value

merkle_root.description: Merkle tree root after this leaf was appended

proof.description: Merkle inclusion proof — sibling hashes from leaf to root

meta.description: Optional metadata — repo, branch, actor, etc.
